channel.title: Synchronizer on Kevin wang's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Synchronizer on Kevin wang's blog

item.title: java concurrency - Synchronizer Framework
item.description: ReentrantLock, Semaphore, and CountDownLatch look unrelated at the API level, but each holds a private Sync extends AbstractQueuedSynchronizer. The Sync subclass overrides tryAcquire / tryRelease and decides what state represents. AbstractQueuedSynchronizer (AQS) is the base class: it owns state, the CLH sync queue, acquire / release, and the nested ConditionObject.
